claims.summary: Witness should select the newest valid chamber state even when a newer file is partial or malformed.
claims.disposition: verify resilient selection and malformed-count tests

claims.summary: Relational data outside weather and gravity needs a non-categorical tension path.
claims.disposition: verify relational_metrics_present and lambda-tension evidence remains unclassified

claims.summary: Witness relational evidence should inform interpretation without mutating the ESN or controller.
claims.disposition: verify it enters read-only prompt context and has no sensory or control dispatch path

claims.summary: The shared collaboration root should be deploy-configurable instead of fixed to one absolute machine path.
claims.disposition: implement ASTRID_SHARED_COLLAB_DIR for chamber and correspondence Witness reads while preserving the existing default

claims.summary: A missing or empty path override must preserve current behavior.
claims.disposition: verify the pure resolver returns the established default for absent and empty values and the custom path for an explicit value
